offer: For medical office managers processing 10–20 appointments/month, inaccurate billing causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of appointment and billing records.
problem: Inaccurate billing due to mismatched appointment records.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical office managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to medical office managers with demo video
Join community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try manual entry for appointment and billing data
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Set default reminder schedules for appointments
Allow CSV import for existing appointment data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
